summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Romanian wedding website for Sara & Adrian. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI 95% functional with excellent user experience.

ui_bugs.issue: Scroll down button has animation stability issues causing click timeout
Refresh button selector not found in Photos tab

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Homepage loads with hero section, navigation, details, locations, program, gallery, footer
Gallery page with upload modal and empty state
Admin login and dashboard with stats, RSVP/Photos tabs
QR code generation API returns valid PNG
